name: Spinach Roll Ups
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the 8 lasagna noodles.
2. Mix ingredients 2 through 7 for the filling.
3. Cool the cooked noodles and lay them out flat.
4. Spread two or three tablespoons of the filling on each cooked noodle.
5. Roll up each noodle end to end.
6. Stand up the roll-ups in a two-quart casserole or greased eight-inch square pan.
7. In a separate bowl, sauté garlic and onion in olive oil until soft.
8. Add basil and tomato sauce; stir to fully blend.
9. Pour over the lasagna noodles.
10. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes.
